# Pull request

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New test(s)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Framework / config
- [ ] CI / reporting
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes (type-check + ESLint + Prettier)
- [ ] Relevant suite(s) run locally and pass
- [ ] New tests use Page Objects / fixtures and web-first assertions
- [ ] Allure labels (`parentSuite`, `feature`, ...) added for new suites
- [ ] Tags (`@smoke` / `@regression`) applied where relevant
- [ ] Conventional Commit title
